applications.name: MK_editor
applications.purpose: Visible desktop editor shell is explicitly deferred during the First-Party Desktop Platform And SDL3 Removal milestone. The previous SDL3/Dear ImGui shell has been removed from active build lanes so SDL3 can be deleted cleanly without carrying compatibility shims. `MK_editor_core` remains the supported editor logic and AI-operable retained-model surface for project IO, authoring, profiler rows, generated game studio rows, input rebinding rows, play-in-editor review rows, and game-module driver tests. `tools/build-gui.ps1` and `tools/evaluate-cpp23.ps1 -Gui` fail closed with a deferral message. A future visible shell must be implemented as a focused first-party Windows adapter, using Win32/D3D12 or another audited native stack, and must not depend on SDL3 or expose native handles through public editor/game APIs.
